overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a player exploring a snowy arctic wilderness at night under the aurora borealis. The player approaches a log cabin, walks along a frozen lake, and eventually enters the water to swim underwater through a rocky canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest approach to log cabin

events.description: player raises pistol in a ready position while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow toward a log cabin, pistol drawn and scanning the area

entered.detail: snow-covered boulder outcropping in the foreground
two-story wooden log structure with warm light in windows
dense pine and spruce trees covering the hillside
green teal northern lights illuminating the night sky

segments.scene_description: The player moves through deep snow among large rock formations, approaching a solitary log cabin in a remote arctic forest. The aurora borealis casts an ethereal green glow across the snow-covered landscape as the player advances with weapon ready.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen lakeside path beside log cabin

events.description: moving from rocky terrain to the frozen lakeside beside the cabin

agents.ego_description: passing the log cabin on the right side while moving along the frozen shoreline

entered.detail: icy frozen water with patches of snow and visible cracks
small wooden pier structure extending toward the water near the cabin

segments.scene_description: The player passes the log cabin on the right, revealing a frozen lake surface to the left. The camera moves along the shoreline where snow meets ice, with the cabin's wooden dock visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open frozen river valley under aurora borealis

events.description: aurora borealis becomes more prominent directly overhead as the player moves into open area
approaching the edge of the ice where it meets dark open water

agents.ego_description: walking across the frozen river surface toward open water, with the aurora glowing overhead

entered.detail: snow-capped mountains visible across the frozen lake under the aurora
unfrozen dark water visible beyond the ice edge

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a wide open frozen river valley with the aurora borealis glowing intensely overhead. Distant snow-capped mountains frame the horizon as the player approaches the transition from ice to open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: submerged river canyon with rocky walls

events.description: player enters the icy water and submerges below the surface

agents.ego_description: entering the dark water and swimming underwater through a narrow rocky canyon

entered.detail: rocky canyon wall visible underwater with greenish algae
rocky canyon wall visible underwater creating a narrow passage
rippling water surface visible from below with aurora light filtering through

segments.scene_description: The player submerges into the icy water, transitioning to an underwater view of a narrow rocky canyon. The murky green water limits visibility as the player swims between rock walls, with the surface shimmering faintly above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a frozen arctic forest into the depths of a submerged rocky canyon. It begins by pushing through deep snow and large rock formations toward a solitary log cabin, all illuminated by the ethereal green glow of the aurora borealis. As the camera passes the cabin, the terrain shifts to a shoreline where the snow meets the glassy surface of a frozen lake and a distant wooden dock. The scene then expands into a wide frozen river valley framed by distant snow-capped mountains before the camera reaches the edge of the ice. Finally, the perspective plunges beneath the surface, transitioning from the open night sky to a murky underwater view of a narrow canyon with shimmering light filtering down from above.
